commands.summary: Dry-run showed 20260523094705_schema_v1.sql before the first push.
Applied 20260523094705_schema_v1.sql to the linked Supabase project.
Dry-run showed 20260523095800_fix_composite_fk_delete_actions.sql before the follow-up push.
Applied 20260523095800_fix_composite_fk_delete_actions.sql to the linked Supabase project.
Local and Remote both show 20260523094705 and 20260523095800.
Migration contains all eight required tables, RLS enable statements, auth.uid() policies, and a private photos bucket.
No API key, JWT-like secret, database URL, service role key literal, DB password literal, or Gemini key literal found in supabase/ or web/.

notes: The first schema migration was pushed by Codex after dry-run approval.
The follow-up migration was pushed by the user because Codex escalation approval timed out for the remote command.
No secret values were recorded in artifacts.
